label: bear
groundingNote: an {urn:molecule-v0:animal|animal} [m] of one kind; it is very big; it does not live with people, it lives far from people; if someone is very near one, something very bad can happen to this someone
notes: Animal kind. TinyStories 'bear' is also frequently the toy (teddy bear); the toy sense is classified transitively (teddy -> child+make+bear).
